description: Client-Side Refactoring — modernize build tooling, code quality tooling, testing infrastructure, HTTP client migration, constants extraction, hooks refactoring, and new poems history pages

userStories.title: Install and configure Vitest and Playwright
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Vitest for unit tests and Playwright for end-to-end tests so that we have a proper testing infrastructure before writing any tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Install vitest, @vitejs/plugin-react, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom, @testing-library/user-event, and jsdom as dev dependencies
Create vitest.config.ts at project root with: jsdom environment, path aliases matching tsconfig.json, coverage configuration, setup file reference
Create vitest.setup.ts that imports @testing-library/jest-dom/vitest
Install @playwright/test as dev dependency and run npx playwright install
Create playwright.config.ts at project root with: base URL http://localhost:3000, test directory e2e/, reasonable timeouts
Create e2e/ directory with a sample smoke test (e.g., landing page loads successfully)
Add scripts to package.json: test, test:run, test:coverage, test:e2e
A trivial sample unit test (e.g., src/lib/__tests__/utils.test.ts testing cn()) passes with yarn test:run
The sample Playwright smoke test passes with yarn test:e2e (when dev server is running)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace Prettier with Biome (keep ESLint)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to use Biome as the formatter (replacing Prettier) while keeping ESLint for linting, because Biome's CSS linter and Tailwind class sorting are still experimental.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @biomejs/biome as dev dependency
Run biome migrate prettier --write to migrate Prettier config to Biome
Configure biome.json formatter: quoteStyle double, trailingCommas none, lineWidth 100
Configure Biome import sorting in biome.json to match the current .prettierrc import order groups
Enable useSortedClasses nursery rule in biome.json with functions: [clsx, cn, cva]
Remove Prettier-related packages: prettier, @ianvs/prettier-plugin-sort-imports, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss
Delete .prettierrc and .prettierignore
Keep ESLint: eslint, eslint-config-next, eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, and eslint.config.mjs remain unchanged
Update package.json scripts: format uses biome format, lint stays as ESLint, lint:fix combines both, lint:ci combines both, add check script
Update lint-staged config: replace prettier --write with biome format --write; keep eslint --fix
Run biome format --write . across the entire codebase
Run biome check --write . to apply import sorting and Tailwind class sorting
Verify ESLint still works: yarn lint passes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Extract hardcoded status values into constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all hardcoded status values centralized in src/constants/status.ts so that the codebase is consistent and maintainable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/constants/status.ts with a const object exporting processing status values: IDLE, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, ERROR. Derive a ProcessingStatusType union type from it.
Scan and replace all hardcoded status string literals (processing, success, error, idle) in hooks and tuner components
Update barrel export in src/constants/ with re-exports
All existing functionality works identically after replacement
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract hardcoded query keys into constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all hardcoded TanStack Query keys centralized in src/constants/query-keys.ts so that query key management is consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/constants/query-keys.ts with query key constants: POEM_SOURCE_STATUS, POEMS, USERS, etc.
Replace hardcoded query keys in all hooks with constants from query-keys.ts
Update barrel export in src/constants/
All existing functionality works identically after replacement
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract hardcoded API paths and error messages into constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all hardcoded API endpoint paths and error messages centralized in src/constants/api.ts so that the codebase is consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/constants/api.ts with API-related constants: endpoint paths (/api/v1/login, /api/v1/logout, /api/v1/user, /api/v1/poem-source, etc.), timeout values, default error messages
Replace hardcoded API paths in src/server/actions/tuner.ts and other files with constants
Replace hardcoded error message strings in hooks, server actions, and src/lib/api.ts
Translate the Turkish error message 'Bilinmeyen hata' to English ('Unknown error')
Update barrel export in src/constants/
All existing functionality works identically after replacement
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace Axios with ky in src/lib/api.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to replace the Axios-based HTTP client in src/lib/api.ts with ky so that the HTTP client is lightweight and modern.
acceptanceCriteria: Install ky as a dependency
Rewrite src/lib/api.ts: replace axios.create() with ky.create() using equivalent configuration (base URL, timeout, JSON accept header)
Migrate request interceptor to ky beforeRequest hook
Migrate response error interceptor to ky beforeError hook
Rewrite get(), post(), put(), del() helpers using ky API (.json() for response parsing)
Translate the Turkish error message 'Bilinmeyen hata' to English if not already done
Remove axios from package.json
All API calls using the helpers still work identically
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace raw fetch() in hooks with ky
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to replace raw fetch() calls in polling hooks with ky for consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace fetch() in src/hooks/use-processing-status-fetch.ts with ky
Replace fetch() in src/hooks/use-result-fetch.ts with ky
Both hooks work identically after migration (polling, error handling, retry)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace raw fetch() in server actions and BFF routes with ky
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to replace raw fetch() calls in server actions and BFF route handlers with ky for consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace fetch() in src/server/actions/tuner.ts with ky
Replace fetch() in BFF route handlers (src/app/api/auth/, src/app/api/tuner/) with ky
Replace fetch() in server API clients (src/server/api/auth.ts) with ky
All auth flow and tuner flow work identically after migration
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create unit tests for utility functions and route constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for utility and route modules so that I have a safety net before refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for src/lib/utils.ts — cn() utility (merging classes, handling edge cases)
Tests for src/lib/routes-book.ts — route constant values, type correctness
Tests for src/lib/api.ts — get(), post(), put(), del() helpers, interceptor behavior, error handling
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create unit tests for use-source-create hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the source create hook so I have a safety net before refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Happy path: successful upload sets sourceId and shows success toast
Error path: failed upload sets processing to error, shows error toast
Exception path: thrown error is caught, processing set to error
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create unit tests for use-processing-status-fetch hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the processing status polling hook so I have a safety net before refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns processing status while polling
Stops polling when status is success
Stops polling when status is error
Sets isError when response is not OK
Retry behavior (3 retries) verified
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create unit tests for use-result-fetch hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the result fetch hook so I have a safety net before refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Does not fetch when status is not success (enabled: false)
Fetches poems when status is success
Sets active poem to critic's choice when available
Falls back to first poem when no critic's choice
Handles empty poems array
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create unit tests for tuner components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for TunerResult and TunerForm components so I have a safety net before refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: TunerResult: renders processing state, error state, success state with active poem, poem selector buttons, critic's choice highlight
TunerForm: renders form in idle state, shows TunerResult in processing state, shows ErrorReport in error state, image preview after file selection, form submission calls sourceCreate
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create unit tests for server actions (tuner)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for tuner server actions so I have a safety net before refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Successful upload returns { success: true, data: {...} }
Failed API response returns { success: false, error: '...' }
Missing access token triggers redirect
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor hooks error handling (toast instead of throw)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see friendly toast notifications when something goes wrong instead of the app crashing, and a clear message when all retries are exhausted.
acceptanceCriteria: In use-processing-status-fetch.ts: do NOT throw when response.ok is false — report via toast.error() with user-friendly translated message
After all retries (3) exhausted with server errors, set status to a failed state
When in failed state, UI shows translated message: 'We are unable to process your request at this time. Please, try again later'
Add translation keys for retry-exhausted message in all locale files
In use-result-fetch.ts: do NOT throw when response.ok is false — report via toast.error()
After all retries (4) exhausted, set an error state that the UI can display
Existing tests updated to verify new behavior (toast called, not thrown)
New tests added for retry-exhaustion edge cases
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Migrate build configuration from Webpack to Rspack
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the project to use Rspack instead of Webpack so that build times are faster and the toolchain is more modern.
acceptanceCriteria: Install next-rspack as dev dependency (version matching Next.js 16.x)
Remove webpack dependency from package.json
Update next.config.ts: wrap config with withRspack(), remove RuleSetRule import from webpack
Verify @next/bundle-analyzer works with Rspack — if incompatible, document and remove temporarily
Verify next-intl plugin works with Rspack — if incompatible, document workaround
Update the analyze script in package.json to remove --webpack flag
Turbopack configuration in next.config.ts remains unchanged
yarn dev, yarn build, and yarn start all work without errors
SVG imports still render correctly as React components
All existing unit tests pass after migration
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Known risk: compatibility issues between next-rspack@16.x and @next/bundle-analyzer + next-intl plugin. Test thoroughly. If unstable, defer.

userStories.title: Create server-side API service for poem sources
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a server-side ky service to fetch poem sources from fast-api so the poems list page can use server-side data fetching.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/server/api/poem-sources.ts with getPoemSources() function
Function calls GET ${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL}/api/v1/poem-sources using ky
Reads access_token from cookies via cookies() from next/headers
Returns typed PoemSourceRead[] array
Create PoemSourceRead type in src/types/ if not exists
Handle auth failures (redirect to signin) and network errors gracefully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create poems list page (/poems)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a list of all my poem requests so that I can browse my history and navigate to individual results.
acceptanceCriteria: Create page at src/app/[locale]/poems/page.tsx — route: /poems
Page is a Server Component that calls getPoemSources() directly
Page title from translations via getTranslations()
Each list item displays: thumbnail (~80x80 px, object-cover), creation date formatted via next-intl getFormatter(), date is a Link to /poems/{poem_source_id}
Handle empty state: show 'No poems yet' with a link to tuner page
Handle error state: show user-friendly error message
Register route in src/lib/routes-book.ts: add poems to routesBook and routesPrivate
Add navigation link to this page from the dashboard
Add all user-facing text to src/messages/en.json and src/messages/de.json
Create unit tests for the page and server service
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create poem detail page (/poems/[id])
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view the poems generated for a specific request so that I can read and switch between poem variations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create page at src/app/[locale]/poems/[id]/page.tsx — route: /poems/{poem_source_id}
Extract shared poem display logic from TunerResult into a reusable PoemDisplay component
Page displays active poem, allows switching between poems, highlights critic's choice
Add a Link back to the poems list page (/poems)
Handle loading, error, and not-found states
Add all user-facing text to locale files
Create unit tests for PoemDisplay component and poem detail page
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Redirect tuner on success, allow retry on error
userStories.description: As a user, when my poem is successfully generated I want to be redirected to the poem detail page, and when there's an error I want to retry without reloading.
acceptanceCriteria: When processing status becomes success: redirect to /poems/{poem_source_id} using useRouter().push()
Do NOT render TunerResult inline on success
When processing status becomes error: show error message on tuner page (no redirect)
Show a 'Try again' button that is only visible in error state
Clicking 'Try again' resets component state to idle; previously selected image preview remains visible
Add translation keys for 'Try again' button text in all locale files
Create unit tests: redirect on success, error state shows message, try again resets state, image preview persists
All tests pass with yarn test:run
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
